items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 1 miles NORTH of Exit 19: I-76 EAST - WALT WHITMAN BR/PACKER AVE and Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE. There is a shoulder closed.
items.formatted: I-95 (Philadelphia County) | Multi-vehicle crash on I-95 northbound between 1 miles NORTH of Exit 19: I-76 EAST - WALT WHITMAN BR/PACKER AVE and Exit 20: COLUMBUS BLVD/WASHINGTON AVE. There is a shoulder closed. Estimated Reopen: 7/21/26 - 12:15
